rationale_source: F1.AD rural-address handling: non-standard 'RR #3, Site 22, Comp 7' format doesn't match ADDR_LINE_RE; F1.PC NB E-prefix FSA still resolves; address falls back to raw broker/doc string

subject_property_address.rationale: Rural address format bypasses ADDR_LINE_RE structured extraction; F1.AD falls back to raw string from docs-tier (cross-doc agreement). Canonical value preserved as-is.

postal_code.rationale: F1.PC NB E-prefix FSA mapping per R10-D FSA_LETTER_TO_PROVINCE.

must_include.rationale: Rural address preserved as-is in Snapshot.
F1.PC NB province inference per R10-D.
